fields.name: Invest in Irrigation Projects
fields.description: Government invests heavily in new irrigation infrastructure to support farmers.

fields.name: Provide Financial Aid Only
fields.description: Distribute subsidies and financial support to affected farmers.

fields.name: Ignore and Hope for Rain
fields.description: Take no immediate action, hoping the drought will end naturally.

fields.name: Negotiate Exceptions
fields.description: Diplomats work with the EU to reduce sanctions impact.

fields.name: Comply Fully
fields.description: Immediate full compliance with EU sanctions to avoid penalties.

fields.name: Resist and Challenge
fields.description: Government publicly challenges sanctions, risking diplomatic tension.

fields.name: Enforce Environmental Regulations
fields.description: Impose strict limits and fines on factories emitting pollutants.

fields.name: Provide Incentives for Clean Tech
fields.description: Offer tax breaks and subsidies to factories that adopt cleaner technologies.

fields.name: Take No Action
fields.description: Avoid intervening, hoping the issue resolves naturally.

fields.name: Increase Teacher Salaries
fields.description: Allocate additional funds to raise teacher pay

fields.name: Negotiate Partial Compromise
fields.description: Offer moderate salary increase and improved conditions.

fields.name: Refuse Demands
fields.description: Keep budget unchanged, risking prolonged strike.

fields.name: Deploy Emergency IT Teams
fields.description: Immediately send expert teams to recover systems and secure networks.

fields.name: Invest in Long-Term Cybersecurity
fields.description: Upgrade infrastructure to prevent future attacks.

fields.name: Delay Action
fields.description: Wait for external assistance, risking further damage.
